en: Come on. The two of you could have been two super Dunphys.
ko: 자, 너희 둘은 두 명의 슈퍼 바보가 될 수도 있었는데, 지금 뭐가 되어버렸니?

en: And instead, what are you? Two bickering half-Dunphys.
ko: 두 명의 다투는 반 바보들, 그리고 나는 더 많은 걸 기대한 바보야. 알겠어? 듣고 싶지 않아. 그냥 위로 올라가.

en: And I'm the fool that expected more. You know what? You over-exaggerated.
I don't want to hear it. Just go upstairs. Go.
That was a master class in parenting.
Right now, our daughters are upstairs making a decision they think is their own,
but really it was an idea that was skillfully implanted by me.
ko: 그들이 스스로 결정했다고 생각하는 걸 하고 있지만, 사실 그건 내가 능숙하게

en: Inception, Claire. Dangerous game, but I like it.

ko: 저게 뭐야? 줄타기 신발이야. 춤추러 가려면 신발을 신어야 해.

en: You want to go to the dance? You gotta wear the shoes.
Honey, I think those are jazz shoes.
ko: 자기야, 저건 재즈 슈즈인 것 같아.

en: Nope. Tight-rope shoes. Got them at an estate sale.
Only worn once. That is not a ringing in door.
ko: 한 번 이상은 아니야. 그건 좋은 추천이 아니야.
